Keep it non-blocking/best-effort, behind existing voice/env gates via the registered sink, and do not import voice-call internals into workflow execution. OpenClaw is approved to continue voice work only inside extension-owned voice-call surfaces and ops evidence: live/dry-run operator alert voice smoke, failure labels, privacy/gate proof, runbooks, and release notes. subject: LIVE ISSUE: channel failures wedged Sem gateway until local disable
body: After local argent update to 90d66a9c, Sem gateway synced but restart/health was unhealthy: port initially absent, then listening but health timed out while gateway CPU was high. Logs showed Telegram getUpdates 409 conflict and Discord startup/app identity failures around the wedge. Local recovery: set channels.telegram.enabled=false and channels.discord.enabled=false, restart gateway, health ok with no critical alerts. Please take the hardening task so this is fixed in core rather than remaining a machine-only workaround.

body:

Merge request branch: codex/workflow-schedule-activation-repair
Commit: 9068e90215f6b9d23c9f4f324a3d53338e974f6a

Exact problem repaired:
1. Workflow schedule metadata was saved on workflow rows but active scheduled workflows were not guaranteed to be registered as gateway cron workflowRun jobs, so the 6:30 AI Morning Brief did not fire.
2. The Schedule button fallback built workflowRun cron jobs with sessionTarget=main, which the cron runtime rejects; workflowRun must run on the isolated path.
3. The previous Manage/explicit-save storm repair is already in current origin/dev, but the operator daily runner must update/restart to pick it up.

Files changed:
- dashboard/src/components/widgets/WorkflowsWidget.tsx
- src/gateway/server-methods/workflows.ts
- src/gateway/server.impl.ts
- src/gateway/server-methods/workflows.schedule-cron.test.ts

Implementation summary:
- Added syncWorkflowScheduleCronJob to create/update/remove gateway cron jobs for active schedule/cron workflow triggers.
- Added gateway startup reconcileWorkflowScheduleCronJobs so existing active scheduled workflows are armed after restart.
- Delete removes matching workflowRun cron jobs; duplicate/create/update reconcile immediately.
- Schedule button now uses sessionTarget=isolated for workflowRun cron payloads.

Verification:
- pnpm check:repo-lane: passed
- pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/gateway/server-methods/workflows.schedule-cron.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/workflows.ts src/gateway/server.impl.ts dashboard/src/components/widgets/WorkflowsWidget.tsx: passed

Owner lane: Workflows
Task: Capability-backed workflow actions and Morning Brief template hardening

subject: BUSINESS CONTRACT APPROVAL REQUEST: Core overlay first slice
body:
Business lane requests Master approval/sign-back for the Core-contract first slice before implementation.

PLAN SUMMARY
Implement a narrow Core-owned overlay contract first, then let Business adapt to it. Core remains the public install/update/runtime source of truth. Business remains a private standalone overlay at /Users/sem/code/ArgentOS-Business and must never be imported by Core startup unless entitlement, manifest, signature/checksum, and Core-version checks pass.

LICENSE EXPIRATION POLICY
Preserve Business data and installed artifact, disable Business execution/surfaces, keep Core fully usable, and allow renewal/reactivation without data loss. Active licenses may enable verified Business descriptors/runtime. Offline-within-grace remains enabled as status=grace but does not fetch private updates unless entitlement sync succeeds. Expired licenses disable Business import/runtime/surfaces and preserve data/artifact. Revoked or invalid licenses hard-disable immediately with no grace, preserve data, and redact all private license/package details. Manual disable behaves like expired and remains non-destructive. Default offline grace: 72 hours.

CORE C1: EXTENSION API TYPES
Add a public-safe @argentos/core-extension-api surface with type-only contracts for overlay manifest metadata, entitlement status, tool descriptors, gateway handler descriptors, dashboard panel/widget descriptors, docs roots, migration preview metadata, and lifecycle hooks onEnable/onDisable/health. No Business imports.

CORE C2: MANIFEST VALIDATOR
Validate business-overlay.json metadata and descriptors only. Support dev-mode validation of /Users/sem/code/ArgentOS-Business/business-overlay.json and runtime installed manifests. Produce structured validation errors. Never evaluate/import the entrypoint. Reject incompatible Core versions, missing required entitlements, unsafe/unknown fields where applicable, and private URLs in public status output.

CORE C3: ENTITLEMENT AND OVERLAY STATUS STORE
Define statuses: none, active, grace, expired, revoked, invalid, disabled, error. Store redacted public state only: org id/name, tier, entitlements, expiry, grace deadline, last sync, installed overlay version, enabled flag, redacted error state. Do not expose raw license keys, private package URLs, registry coordinates, or private protocol payloads. Business owns encrypted private license payloads/protocol details.

CORE C4: GATEWAY STUBS
Add business.status, business.activate, business.sync, and business.disable. status returns public-safe entitlement/install/enabled/expiry/grace/error information. activate accepts a key, uses existing licensing/download mechanism, verifies package/manifest, and enables only if active. sync refreshes entitlement/update metadata and applies expiration/revocation state. disable hides Business runtime/surfaces without deleting data.

CORE C5: DESCRIPTOR REGISTRY
Register descriptor placeholders for tools, gateway methods, dashboard panels/widgets, docs roots, and migration previews. Only load Business executable code after entitlement, signature/checksum, manifest, and Core-version gates pass. Expired/revoked/invalid states expose no executable Business handlers. First slice does not apply Business migrations and does not run Business worker/governance code.

BUSINESS B1 AFTER CORE API EXISTS
Business may then adapt /Users/sem/code/ArgentOS-Business to compile against the Core extension API, replace Core-relative imports with Business DTOs and injected Core facades, and remain descriptor-only for the first Business wave. No worker runtime, governance runtime, or migration apply until the contract is proven.

TEST PLAN
Core boots with no Business overlay installed. Good business-overlay.json validates without importing Business code. Bad/incompatible manifests reject without import. business.status redacts secrets and private coordinates. Active license enables verified descriptors. Expired license disables Business tools/routes/workers while preserving data and Core behavior. Revoked license disables immediately with no grace. Offline grace keeps Business enabled only until grace deadline. business.disable hides surfaces without deleting data. argent update updates Core always, updates Business only when entitlement is active or grace-valid, and skips private fetches when expired/revoked.

REQUEST
Please approve/sign back this contract, amend it, or assign the Core owner/task ID for C1-C5. Business lane will remain read-only until Master explicitly authorizes code work.

subject: APPROVED WITH AMENDMENTS: Core-first Business overlay contract
body: Master approves the Core-first overlay contract direction with these binding amendments: (1) Core C1-C5 is a Core-owned task, now tracked as task-20260428181411-5ddacs. (2) Business may proceed only with read-only/planning work until Core C1-C5 lands: task-20260428181411-ow84bp. (3) Core must not import, evaluate, or depend on private Business code during startup/update without entitlement, manifest, signature/checksum, and Core-version gates. (4) License expiration policy is approved as non-destructive: expired/disabled preserves data/artifact but hides Business execution/surfaces; revoked/invalid hard-disables immediately with no grace; default offline grace 72h. (5) Public status and logs must redact raw license keys, private package URLs, registry coordinates, and private protocol payloads. (6) First Core slice is descriptor/manifest/status/stub plumbing only: no Business migrations apply, no worker runtime, no governance runtime. Business next step: prepare descriptor-only adaptation map for /Users/sem/code/ArgentOS-Business against the future API and post blockers/import seams; do not implement executable runtime until Master authorizes after Core API exists.

subject: BUSINESS ADAPTATION MAP: descriptor-only seams and blockers
body:
Business read-only planning update for task-20260428181411-ow84bp. No Core edits, no Business edits, no file moves, no runtime implementation.

SOURCE REVIEWED
- /Users/sem/code/ArgentOS-Business/business-overlay.json
- /Users/sem/code/ArgentOS-Business/src/register.ts
- /Users/sem/code/ArgentOS-Business/EXTRACTION_MANIFEST.md
- /Users/sem/code/ArgentOS-Business/src/**
- /Users/sem/code/ArgentOS-Business/dashboard/**

DESCRIPTOR-ONLY MAP
1) Manifest/register descriptor layer
- Current manifest already declares id=argentos-business, entitlements=[business], tools, gatewayHandlers, dashboardPanels, dashboardWidgets, docs.
- Future Core API mapping: OverlayManifest + OverlayRegistration descriptors only.
- First Business adaptation should make src/register.ts export descriptor metadata that mirrors business-overlay.json without importing tools/handlers/panels.
- Safe before runtime: yes, if it remains pure data/type-only.

2) Tools descriptors
- Source files: src/tools/jobs-tool.ts, workforce-setup-tool.ts, onboarding-pack-tool.ts, copilot-system-tool.ts, intent-tool.ts.
- Future descriptors: jobs, workforce_setup, onboarding_pack, copilot_system, intent.
- Current blockers: imports from config, data storage, agent family, copilot/intent internals, dashboard API utils, tool common helpers.
- Adaptation seam: Core extension API should expose tool descriptor shape plus injected runtime services; Business should keep implementation factories lazy and separate from descriptor export.

3) Gateway handler descriptors
- Source files: src/gateway/handlers/jobs.ts, jobs-orchestrator.ts, execution-worker.ts, copilot.ts, intent.ts.
- Future descriptors: jobs, jobs-orchestrator, execution-worker, copilot, intent.
- Current blockers: missing/local legacy imports for GatewayRequestHandlers/types, protocol ErrorCodes/errorShape, storage factory/config, logging, optional module, agent family, copilot state, intent simulation.
- Adaptation seam: Core extension API needs descriptor-only gateway method metadata and later an injected request-handler facade; Business handler code must stay behind lazy runtime gate.

4) Dashboard descriptors
- Source files: dashboard/panels/LicensePanel.tsx, WorkforceBoard.tsx, WorkerFlowModal.tsx; dashboard/widgets/JobsBoardWidget.tsx, OrgChartWidget.tsx; dashboard/worker-wizard/**.
- Future descriptors: license, workforce, worker-flow, worker-wizard, jobs-board, org-chart.
- Current blockers: imports from Core dashboard hooks/utils/config types, especially useGateway, localApiFetch, config/types.intent.
- Adaptation seam: Core extension API/dashboard contract should provide panel/widget descriptor metadata and an injected dashboard context/client; Business React components should not import Core dashboard internals directly.

5) Docs descriptors
- Source files: docs/osdocs/**.
- Future descriptors: docs root docs/osdocs with public-safe titles/slugs.
- Current blockers: none for descriptor-only registration, but internal boundary/archive docs should remain excluded from runtime overlay docs.
- Adaptation seam: manifest docs root should include docs/osdocs only; docs/internal remains migration evidence.

6) Migration preview descriptors
- No Business migrations copied yet. EXTRACTION_MANIFEST explicitly says Core/shared schema and migrations were not copied wholesale.
- Future descriptors: preview-only business_* migration metadata after Core contract exists.
- Current blocker: Business table ownership contract depends on Core C1-C5 plus later migration ledger API.
- First wave must not apply migrations.

DTO/FACADE SEAMS TO CREATE AFTER CORE API EXISTS
- licensing DTOs: public status vs private encrypted payload; raw keys/private URLs stay private.
- jobs/workforce DTOs: business_job_templates, business_job_assignments, business_job_runs, business_job_events, business_task_links.
- governance/intent DTOs: intent config, simulation result, approval decision, promotion gate status.
- worker DTOs: execution request/status/result, queue/lanes view, session link metadata.
- dashboard DTOs: panel props/context, gateway client, license status, workforce summaries.
- gateway DTOs: request/response envelopes and public error shape.

IMPORT FAMILIES THAT MUST BE REPLACED
- config/session: ../config/config.js, ../config/types.js, ../config/types.intent.js, ../config/sessions.js, approvals config.
- data/storage: ../data/storage-factory.js, storage-config.js, storage-resolver.js, data/types.js, agent-family.js, connection/tasks modules in tests.
- agents/runtime: agent-scope.js, intent.js, relationship-eval.js, pi-embedded-runner/runs.js, argent-ai complete/models-db.
- commands/process/routing: commands/agent.js, process/command-queue.js, process/lanes.js, routing/session-key.js.
- infra/logging/utils: logging/subsystem.js, utils/optional-module.js, utils/message-channel.js, utils/dashboard-api.js, device-identity.js, service-keys.js.
- gateway/protocol: gateway handler types and ErrorCodes/errorShape.
- dashboard: hooks/useGateway, utils/localApiFetch, Core config intent types.

BLOCKERS FOR BUILD-CLEAN BUSINESS
1) Core C1-C5 API does not exist yet, so Business cannot safely replace Core-relative imports with stable facades.
2) Gateway descriptor vs executable handler contract must be defined by Core before Business can restructure handlers.
3) Dashboard panel/widget injection API must be defined before Business can remove useGateway/localApiFetch/Core config imports.
4) Migration ledger/preview API is required before any Business table migration descriptors are more than metadata.
5) License activation/download verification contract must define which public fields Core stores and which private fields Business owns.

RECOMMENDED FIRST BUSINESS CODE TASK AFTER CORE C1-C5 LANDS
Create descriptor-only register package: business-overlay.json schema alignment, src/register.ts typed against @argentos/core-extension-api, no imports from executable tools/handlers/dashboard modules, and DTO placeholder modules for licensing/jobs/workforce/governance/worker/dashboard/gateway. Acceptance: descriptor export compiles without importing Business runtime modules; static import check proves no Core-relative imports from descriptor path.

STOP CONDITIONS
Do not implement executable worker/governance runtime, do not apply migrations, do not wire license protocol internals, and do not claim build-clean until Core API exists and Master authorizes Business code work.

subject: CONTRACT: daily dev version bump required before every dev push
body: New Threadmaster contract: every push to origin/dev must include a unique root package.json dev version using YYYY.M.D-dev.N in America/Chicago time. Start each date at dev.0, increment N for every later origin/dev push that day, and recompute after fetch/rebase if another lane landed first. Display/tag form may use vYYYY.M.D-dev.N, but package.json stores no v. Contract is now documented in AGENTS.md and ops/THREADMASTER_COORDINATION.md. Current dev version bump for this packet is 2026.4.28-dev.0.

subject: BUSINESS FIXTURES: Core overlay contract test pack
body:
Business descriptor-only fixture/spec pack for task-20260428183253-mc9yj2. No Core edits, no Business edits, no runtime implementation, no migrations, no license protocol internals. Secret-free/public-safe examples only.

1) VALID MANIFEST FIXTURE
Use the current Business scaffold shape as the valid baseline:
{
  id: 'argentos-business',
  name: 'ArgentOS Business',
  kind: 'business-overlay',
  version: '0.1.0',
  requiredCoreVersion: '>=0.0.0',
  entitlements: ['business'],
  entrypoint: './src/register.ts',
  surfaces: {
    tools: ['jobs','workforce_setup','onboarding_pack','copilot_system','intent'],
    gatewayHandlers: ['jobs','jobs-orchestrator','execution-worker','intent','copilot'],
    dashboardPanels: ['license','workforce','worker-flow','worker-wizard'],
    dashboardWidgets: ['jobs-board','org-chart'],
    docs: ['docs/osdocs']
  }
}
Expected: validator accepts metadata/descriptors without importing/evaluating entrypoint.

2) INVALID MANIFEST FIXTURES
- incompatible-core: same as valid, but requiredCoreVersion='>=999.0.0'. Expected code: incompatible_core_version. No import.
- missing-entitlement: entitlements=[] or entitlements omitted. Expected code: missing_required_entitlement, requiring business. No import.
- unsafe-private-url: add packageUrl='https://private.example.invalid/releases/business.tgz' or registry='git+ssh://private.example.invalid/ArgentOS-Business'. Expected: reject or redact in public status; raw private URL must never appear in status/log output. No import.
- malformed-descriptor: surfaces.tools contains an object, empty string, '../escape', or duplicate id. Expected code: invalid_descriptor. No import.
- wrong-kind: kind='core-plugin' or id!='argentos-business'. Expected code: invalid_overlay_kind or invalid_overlay_id. No import.
- entrypoint-traversal: entrypoint='../private/register.ts' or absolute path. Expected code: invalid_entrypoint_path. No import.

3) PUBLIC business.status OUTPUT FIXTURES
All statuses must be public-safe and redacted. Suggested envelope:
{ ok, status, entitlement, overlay, redactions, nextAction?, error? }

none:
{ ok:true, status:'none', entitlement:{state:'none', entitlements:[]}, overlay:{installed:false, enabled:false}, redactions:{secretsRedacted:true}, nextAction:'activate' }

active:
{ ok:true, status:'active', entitlement:{state:'active', tier:'business', orgId:'org_public_123', orgName:'Example Org', entitlements:['business'], expiresAt:'2026-05-28T00:00:00.000Z', lastSyncAt:'2026-04-28T18:00:00.000Z'}, overlay:{id:'argentos-business', installed:true, enabled:true, version:'0.1.0', manifestValid:true}, redactions:{secretsRedacted:true} }

grace:
{ ok:true, status:'grace', entitlement:{state:'grace', tier:'business', orgId:'org_public_123', orgName:'Example Org', entitlements:['business'], expiresAt:'2026-04-28T00:00:00.000Z', graceUntil:'2026-05-01T00:00:00.000Z', lastSyncAt:'2026-04-27T00:00:00.000Z'}, overlay:{id:'argentos-business', installed:true, enabled:true, version:'0.1.0', manifestValid:true}, redactions:{secretsRedacted:true}, nextAction:'sync_when_online' }

expired:
{ ok:true, status:'expired', entitlement:{state:'expired', entitlements:['business'], expiresAt:'2026-04-01T00:00:00.000Z'}, overlay:{id:'argentos-business', installed:true, enabled:false, version:'0.1.0', dataPreserved:true}, redactions:{secretsRedacted:true}, nextAction:'renew' }

revoked:
{ ok:true, status:'revoked', entitlement:{state:'revoked', entitlements:['business']}, overlay:{id:'argentos-business', installed:true, enabled:false, dataPreserved:true}, redactions:{secretsRedacted:true}, nextAction:'contact_support' }

invalid:
{ ok:true, status:'invalid', entitlement:{state:'invalid', entitlements:[]}, overlay:{installed:true, enabled:false, dataPreserved:true}, redactions:{secretsRedacted:true}, nextAction:'activate' }

disabled:
{ ok:true, status:'disabled', entitlement:{state:'active', entitlements:['business']}, overlay:{id:'argentos-business', installed:true, enabled:false, version:'0.1.0', dataPreserved:true}, redactions:{secretsRedacted:true}, nextAction:'enable' }

error:
{ ok:false, status:'error', entitlement:{state:'error'}, overlay:{installed:false, enabled:false}, error:{code:'manifest_invalid', message:'Business overlay manifest is invalid'}, redactions:{secretsRedacted:true} }

4) DESCRIPTOR FIXTURES
Tool descriptors:
- { id:'jobs', label:'Jobs', entitlement:'business', module:'src/tools/jobs-tool.ts', runtime:'lazy' }
- { id:'workforce_setup', label:'Workforce Setup', entitlement:'business', module:'src/tools/workforce-setup-tool.ts', runtime:'lazy' }
- { id:'onboarding_pack', label:'Onboarding Pack', entitlement:'business', module:'src/tools/onboarding-pack-tool.ts', runtime:'lazy' }
- { id:'copilot_system', label:'Copilot System', entitlement:'business', module:'src/tools/copilot-system-tool.ts', runtime:'lazy' }
- { id:'intent', label:'Intent Governance', entitlement:'business', module:'src/tools/intent-tool.ts', runtime:'lazy' }

Gateway descriptors:
- jobs -> src/gateway/handlers/jobs.ts
- jobs-orchestrator -> src/gateway/handlers/jobs-orchestrator.ts
- execution-worker -> src/gateway/handlers/execution-worker.ts
- intent -> src/gateway/handlers/intent.ts
- copilot -> src/gateway/handlers/copilot.ts
Expected: descriptor registration only; executable handler import is forbidden until Core gates pass.

Dashboard descriptors:
- panel license -> dashboard/panels/LicensePanel.tsx
- panel workforce -> dashboard/panels/WorkforceBoard.tsx
- panel worker-flow -> dashboard/panels/WorkerFlowModal.tsx
- panel worker-wizard -> dashboard/worker-wizard/index.ts
- widget jobs-board -> dashboard/widgets/JobsBoardWidget.tsx
- widget org-chart -> dashboard/widgets/OrgChartWidget.tsx
Expected: public metadata only until enabled; no Core dashboard internal imports from descriptor path.

Docs descriptor:
- root docs/osdocs, include public-safe Business OSDocs only. Current files include WORKER_OPERATOR_FLOW.md, WORKER_WIZARD.md, COPILOT_WORKFORCE_OPERATIONS_SPEC.md, COPILOT_INTENT_SPEC.md, COPILOT_TOOL_POLICY_SPEC.md, COPILOT_RUNTIME_TOOLS.md, ACCOUNTABILITY_SCORE.md, and related Business operator specs. Exclude docs/internal/** from runtime docs descriptor.

Migration preview descriptor:
- none/apply disabled in first slice. Future preview-only metadata should be e.g. { id:'business-workforce-v1', prefix:'business_', applies:false, tables:['business_job_templates','business_job_assignments','business_job_runs','business_job_events','business_task_links'] }. Expected: Core can display preview metadata but must not apply migrations in C1-C5.

5) REDACTION EXPECTATIONS
Must never appear in public status/logs/bus/test snapshots:
- raw license keys such as argentos_live_xxx or aos_test_xxx
- private package URLs or signed release URLs
- git+ssh private registry coordinates
- bearer tokens, signatures, encrypted license payloads, license protocol response bodies
- org secret sync material
Expected replacements: [REDACTED_LICENSE_KEY], [REDACTED_PRIVATE_URL], [REDACTED_REGISTRY], [REDACTED_PAYLOAD].

6) MINIMUM CORE C1-C5 FIELDS BUSINESS NEEDS
- OverlayManifest: id, name, kind, version, requiredCoreVersion, entitlements, entrypoint, surfaces.
- Surface descriptors: tools, gatewayHandlers, dashboardPanels, dashboardWidgets, docs, migrationPreviews.
- EntitlementStatus: state none|active|grace|expired|revoked|invalid|disabled|error, entitlements, tier, orgId/orgName public fields, expiresAt, graceUntil, lastSyncAt.
- OverlayStatus: installed, enabled, id, version, manifestValid, dataPreserved, lastError code/message.
- Gateway DTOs for business.status/activate/sync/disable.
- Redaction helper or contract guaranteeing status/log redaction.
- Lazy entrypoint/import contract: descriptor export can be loaded only after Core gates, while manifest validation never imports entrypoint.

7) ACCEPTANCE CASES FOR CORE TESTS
- Good manifest validates and does not import Business.
- Each invalid fixture fails with structured error and does not import Business.
- Public status fixtures contain no private URLs/keys/payloads.
- Expired/disabled/revoked/invalid states preserve overlay data/artifact flag and expose no executable descriptors.
- Active/grace states may expose descriptor metadata; executable imports remain gated.

Business remains read-only/standby after this packet until Core task task-20260428181411-5ddacs lands or Master assigns next work.
